no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states 'when the shift middleware executes before flip, it pushes the popover into the viewport first. While it doesn't say 'swap lines X and Y', the bug description essentially describes the exact fix (change middleware ordering so flip runs before shift).
